description_long: This object is a stylized potted banana plant with a thick, upright green trunk and several large, elongated leaves radiating outward from the top. The leaves are a vibrant green with visible white vein lines and some subtle curvature, giving them a natural, organic appearance. The trunk is segmented, mimicking the layered look of a real banana plant stem, and is slightly thicker at the base. The plant appears to be rooted in a simple, cylindrical pot that is mostly obscured by the dense foliage. There are no visible flowers, fruit, or decorative elements on the pot. The overall look is clean and minimal, suitable for urban landscaping or decorative use in parks and public spaces.
description: A stylized potted banana plant with a thick green trunk and large, arching green leaves, set in a plain cylindrical pot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of the banana plant's leaves and the segmented trunk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arch and curvature of the leaves, with the trunk partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the leaves and the trunk, with some leaves overlapping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the length and droop of the leaves, with the trunk visible.
